name: Kathleen Claiborne's Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Using the butter, flour, sugar and water, make pastry according to Cuisinart directions.
2. Preheat the oven rack to the lower third of the oven at 400°F. Roll the pastry into a 10-inch pie plate, cover with waxed paper and pie weights. Reduce heat to 375°F, bake for an additional 10 minutes, then bake 2-3 more minutes.
3. Reduce heat to 350°F. Brush the pie shell with egg white.
4. Mix corn syrup and brown sugar in a small saucepan over medium heat until the sugar is dissolved.
5. Beat eggs, add the syrup mixture, melted butter, chopped pecans and vanilla. Pour into the prepared shell. Arrange pecan halves on top.
6. Bake until the center is set, 40-50 minutes. If the pie starts to overbrown, cover with foil.
